mapper.insert:
SELECT conversation_turn_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO conversation_turn (id, entry_id, role, content, step_type, turn_order) VALUES (#{id}, #{entryId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{stepType}, #{turnOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT id, entry_id, role, content, step_type, turn_order FROM conversation_turn WHERE entry_id = #{entryId} ORDER BY turn_order
